app_subtitle: Release your thoughts safely and privately

intro.title: The Unsent Letter
description: Sometimes, there are things we wish we could say — but never got the chance to.
This could be because it didn't feel safe, the timing wasn't right, or the words were too hard to express out loud.
This activity gives you a private space to put those thoughts into words.
You don't have to send this letter. This is just for you — to express, release, and understand your feelings better.
intro.notice: Write freely. No one else will see this.

writing.title: Write What You've Been Holding In
writing.desc: You can write to your partner, ex-partner, or even to the relationship itself. There's no right or wrong way to do this.
writing.placeholder:
Dear ____,
I've been wanting to say…
writing.notice: You can pause and come back anytime.

reflection.title: Take a Moment With This
description: You've just put your thoughts and feelings into words — that takes courage.
You might notice a mix of emotions right now, and that's completely okay.
Before you move on, take a breath and gently check in with yourself.
reflection.notice: This was for your healing, not for sending.

history.title: Past Letters
history.empty_title: You haven't written any letters yet.
history.empty_desc: Your letters will appear here after you save them.

toasts.save_success: Letter saved to your private journal
toasts.auth_error: Auth session missing or DB not configured
